pairs.py:
def count_positive(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes with a positive value."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v > 0: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

def count_leaf_or_branch(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes that are leaves or branches (not single-child)."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); kids = adj.get(n, [])
        if len(kids) != 1: acc += 1
        stack.extend(kids)
    return acc

def all_flags_set(spec: dict) -> bool:
    """Return True if every node reachable from start has its flag turned on."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; flags = spec["flags"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        if not flags[n]: return False
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return True

def unique_dep_cost(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Total cost of base plus all transitive deps, each package counted once."""
    deps = spec["deps"]
    cost = spec["cost"]
    seen = set()
    stack = [spec["base"]]
    total = 0
    while stack:
        cur = stack.pop()
        if cur in seen:
            continue
        seen.add(cur)
        total += cost[cur]
        stack.extend(deps.get(cur, []))
    return total

def score_tally(spec: dict) -> int:
    targets = [{"x": float(t[0]), "y": float(t[1]), "z": float(t[2]), "alive": True} for t in spec["targets"]]
    step = float(spec["step"])
    r2 = float(spec["r2"])
    score = 0
    for b in spec["bullets"]:
        if float(b["life"]) <= 0.0:
            continue
        px = float(b["pos"][0]) + float(b["vel"][0]) * step
        py = float(b["pos"][1]) + float(b["vel"][1]) * step
        pz = float(b["pos"][2]) + float(b["vel"][2]) * step
        hit = False
        for t in targets:
            if t["alive"] and not hit:
                dx = px - t["x"]
                dy = py - t["y"]
                dz = pz - t["z"]
                if dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz < r2:
                    t["alive"] = False
                    score += 1
                    hit = True
    return score
